---
title: "Students"
---

# Current Students

- Nestor Ivan Ortiz Rosas – bacteriophage genomics  
- Raúl Cruz Marban – viral proteins and plastic degradation  
- María Guadalupe Ayala – desert microbiomes  
- Eduardo Ferreira Tijera – tick transcriptomics  
- Carlos Corona Sanchez – heavy metal resistance enzymes  
- Laura Guerrero Martinez – mosquito viromes
